_sawppy_id_map: LX-16A IDs expected by config_roverchassis.json.sawppy (rename one servo on the bus at a time from factory ID 1)
_port_discovery: Linux/Pi: plug USB bus adapter, then run: dmesg | tail -30 (or ls -l /dev/serial/by-id/). Common devices: /dev/ttyUSB0 (CH340), /dev/ttyACM0 (CDC ACM). macOS: ls /dev/tty.* for usbserial / wchusbserial / usbmodem. Edit connect.port below to match.
